description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build with vcpkg that runs on push to master, tags starting with v, and on pull requests, but only for specific paths. The workflow should use a matrix strategy across ubuntu, macos, and windows, with Debug and Release build types, and with or without luajit. For each matrix combination, check out the code, initialize CodeQL on ubuntu Debug builds, install the latest CMake, run vcpkg, build with CMake, perform CodeQL analysis on ubuntu Debug builds, and upload build artifacts.
